final:
// // Asynchronous reset and set functionalities. On the rising edge of the clock, if the reset signal is asserted, the output q is set to 1. If the set signal is asserted instead, q is cleared to 0. If neither control signal is active, the output q takes the value of the data input d.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input set,
    input d,
    output reg q
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if(rst) begin
        q <= 0;
    end else if(set) begin
        q <= 1;
    end else begin
        q <= d;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // Asynchronous reset and set functionalities. On the rising edge of the clock, if the reset signal is asserted, the output q is set to 1. If the set signal is asserted instead, q is cleared to 0. If neither control signal is active, the output q takes the value of the data input d.
